productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Multi Coloured Top
description: Style NoteLook chic and feel comfortable in this multi coloured printed top from united colors of benetton. The vibrant colours ad a touch of glamour, while the fabric feels soft on the skin and keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes.Product DetailsMulti coloured printed and sleeveless top, with a round neck in front, broad straps, pleated from the neckline down, a V-neck at the back with a thin strap across, two loops on the waist with a slim belt and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cotton on the front with 90% 100% polyester and 10% viscose at the backMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
